Name: Windows - Ensure Hosts File Entry Exists
Description: Ensures that the given IP/host name entry exists in the hosts file.

Parameters.Name: IP
Parameters.Label: IP Address
Parameters.HelpText: The IP address which the host name should resolve to, e.g. 127.0.0.1

Parameters.Name: HostName
Parameters.Label: Host Name
Parameters.HelpText: The host name which should resolve to the given IP, e.g. www.mydomain.com
